solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def divisorGame(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n > 1
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution checks if n is greater than 1. If it is, Alice can always win by choosing a divisor and reducing n. Otherwise, Bob wins.  This is a direct check with no iterative or recursive operations.
```
